description_long: This is a rustic beer mug crafted from vertically aligned wooden staves, each separated by visible seams and bound together by two wide, dark metallic bands adorned with rivets. The mug features a large, ornate metal handle with a pronounced curl, attached securely to the side. The wood has a weathered, dark brown finish, giving it an aged, medieval appearance, while the metal bands and handle have a slightly tarnished, brassy look. The top of the mug is open, revealing a hollow interior suitable for holding liquid. The overall design is robust and functional, evoking the style of traditional tavern drinkware. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative graphics on the exterior.
description: A weathered wooden beer mug with dark metal bands and a large, curled metal handle, evoking a medieval tavern style.
description_view_0: The mug is shown at an angle, highlighting the curled metal handle and the texture of the wooden staves and metal bands.
description_view_1: A direct side view showing the back of the mug, with the metal band and rivets running vertically and no handle visible.
description_view_2: The opposite angle from view 0, prominently displaying the ornate handle and the wood grain details.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the mug's front, showing the full circle of wooden staves and both metal bands, with the handle hidden from sight.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features natural wood grain patterns and dark metallic bands with rivets, giving it a handcrafted, medieval look. There are no printed graphics, labels, or decorative imagery.
